hooks.command: echo 'Before you do anything, make sure you completely understood your role – as written down in the markdown files – and strictly follow its instructions.'

echo 'Your context is about to be compacted. Before it happens: 1. Write a short status summary in the Notes section of the current increment file in .claude/temp/increments/ (what is done, what is in progress, what is next). 2. If you are on a team, message the team lead with your current status. After compaction, re-read your role from the markdown files and the current increment file to recover context.'
